arts.ttl: Liverpool given Xavi Simons transfer update as 'contact' made for £50m ace ahead of 'big offer'
arts.sum: The latest Liverpool transfer reports and rumours ahead of the summer window opening after the winter market closed on deadline day without the Reds doing any business

arts.ttl: 'I am fully convinced' - Virgil van Dijk sends 'amazing' message as Liverpool 'intensity' explained
arts.sum: Virgil van Dijk believes victory in next month's Carabao Cup final will not necessarily boost Liverpool's aims of winning the Premier League

arts.ttl: Arne Slot's 'underestimated' Liverpool star sets sets eight-year record in Tottenham win
arts.sum: Liverpool reached the final of the Carabao Cup with a dominant victory against Tottenham with one Reds star once again catching the eye after glowing praise from Arne Slot

arts.ttl: Federico Chiesa eyes up fresh opportunity as Liverpool star makes injury return
arts.sum: Arne Slot is expected to make plenty of changes for Liverpool's FA Cup fourth round trip to Plymouth Argyle

arts.ttl: A Liverbird Upon My Chest full lyrics as classic Liverpool terrace song makes comeback
arts.sum: Liverpool fans have been in fine voice at Anfield this season and an old Kop classic has made a welcome comeback

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou: Liverpool currently the best team in the world
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou was probed about Tottenham's underperformance against Liverpool in the second leg of their Carabao Cup semi-final tie.

arts.ttl: Richard Masters 'sends' Liverpool letter as Man City launch 'new legal challenge'
arts.sum: Liverpool watch on as Manchester City reportedly open a fresh legal challenge over the Premier League's Associated Part Transaction (APT) rules

arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk explains how Liverpool have avoided picking up as many injuries as rivals
arts.sum: Liverpool have escaped the significant injury issues the likes of Manchester City, Arsenal and Tottenham have suffered this season and Virgil van Dijk hopes that will continue

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou gets spiky as he comes out swinging less than 24 hours after Liverpool defeat
arts.sum: Liverpool booked their place in the final of the Carabao Cup by thrashing Tottenham Hotspur on Thursday night

arts.ttl: I won everything with Liverpool but what I did on Plymouth debut was one of the best things
arts.sum: Bruce Grobbelaar played for both Liverpool and Plymouth Argyle during his playing career in England
